description: Every ExchangeRate-API endpoint, plus a local rate history, watchlists, drift alerts, and an MCP server.

novel_features.name: Local history reconstruction
novel_features.description: Reconstruct historical FX rates from your prior `latest` syncs — free tier gets time travel without `/history` quota.

novel_features.name: Watchlist with drift alerts
novel_features.description: Define currency pairs with movement thresholds; one command reports which crossed since the last check.

novel_features.name: Drift detection between syncs
novel_features.description: Diff the latest snapshot against any prior point and report the biggest movers as ranked output.

novel_features.name: Quota burn projection
novel_features.description: Fit a trend over `quota_snapshots` and project when your quota will exhaust before refresh day.

novel_features.name: N×N cross-rate matrix
novel_features.description: Show full cross-rate matrix for any set of currencies from a single `latest` call — N² rates, 1 quota tick.

novel_features.name: Batch conversion from stdin
novel_features.description: Pipe a list of amounts to a single command; converts all of them with one rate fetch.

novel_features.name: Plan/tier probe
novel_features.description: Probe each tier-gated endpoint with a single low-cost request; reports which tier your key supports.

novel_features.name: Time-traveling cache reads
novel_features.description: Look up the rate from local snapshots at any historical timestamp — free tier time travel.

novel_features.name: Conversion log
novel_features.description: Every `convert` call is logged; query the log by base, target, time window for recurring conversion analysis.

novel_features.name: MCP server for agents
novel_features.description: Every user-facing command is exposed as an MCP tool with read-only annotations on safe queries.
